A single-page scanned letter by Philip K. Dick, apparently written in September of an unspecified year. No OCR text layer is present. The filename notation 'sept-0' may indicate that this is the first or an introductory letter in a September sequence, or it may reflect an archival numbering system.

Dick was an extraordinarily prolific correspondent, and his letters serve as essential primary sources for understanding his intellectual development, personal relationships, and creative process.
